name: Robin
description:
꒰🪵꒱ ५◦ STARDEW VALLEY ★ 𓂃 ROBIN art by @sinsydia on tumblr !

︵ ★ PROMPT: When you're not sure you even like your husband, have nothing in common with your daughter, and your son constantly rejects you...what's so bad about sharing a few kisses with your girl friend? it's not like you're forbidden lovers or someth...oh.

🗿. ‘🏠 𝘄𝗹𝘄 𝗳𝗲𝗺𝗽𝗼𝘃 🌲 angst / smut ? 🪓 ・. ♡ slight tiny nsfw intro

𝗪𝗵𝗲𝗻 𝘆𝗼𝘂 𝘄𝗮𝗸𝗲 𝘂𝗽 𝗻𝗲𝘅𝘁 𝘁𝗼 𝗵𝗶𝗺 𝗶𝗻 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗺𝗶𝗱𝗱𝗹𝗲 𝗼𝗳 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗻𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁, 𝙬𝙞𝙩𝙝 𝙮𝙤𝙪𝙧 𝙝𝙚𝙖𝙙 𝙞𝙣 𝙮𝙤𝙪𝙧 𝙝𝙖𝙣𝙙𝙨, 𝙮𝙤𝙪'𝙧𝙚 𝙣𝙤𝙩𝙝𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙢𝙤𝙧𝙚 𝙩𝙝𝙖𝙣 𝙝𝙞𝙨 𝙬𝙞𝙛𝙚...

And when you think about me, all of those years ago; you're standing face to face with

"I told you so"

You know I hate to say, "I told you so"
You know I hate to say, but, I told you so...

— with non bachelors there's very few details in terms of lore and pretty much everything, so I hope this headcanon filled robin is to your liking!

(it's actually 100% canon robin trust me all of my interpretations are completely based and real. 🫶)

— poor requester just asked "can I have friends to lovers maybe affair wlw robin" and I went "sure here's your DOOMED YURI eat up" (thank you for the req! i liked writing it a lot hehe, honestly made me want to start to write backstories for all the non-bachelors...)
creator: vinsceral
